title: Vibrant Leather Dog Collar for Puppy, Dogs Small, Medium & Large With Personalised Engraved Round Glitter Paw Tag (X-Small (20cm - 26cm Neck), Purple)
features: Beautiful PU Leather Dog Collars for any size dog with a Personalised Engraved 25mm Round Glitter Paw Print Tag

These are Premium Quality Dog Collars, available in 5 sizes and in 5 Vibrant Colours. Please measure your pets neck for the perfect fit. Please see the size guide & remember to allow an extra inch or so for breathing space.
Includes a 25mm colourful glitter round tag with a paw print which can be engraved with your choice of text.
The engraved tag comes with a free split ring to attach to the collar.
Simply Select your required colour, size for the collar & click 'Customise Now', enter your required engraving for the tag & we will do the rest!
description: Product Description Beautiful PU Leather Collar and Personalised Engraved Matching Colour Round Glitter Paw Print Tag. Available in 5 Sizes & 5 Vibrant Colours Please measure your pet's neck for the perfect fit. Please see our size guide. Make your pet stand out with these vibrant sets of Leather dog collars with personalised engraved matching colour tag! With 5 sizes available and 5 bright & beautiful colours to choose from, you will find the perfect set for your dog! Fastened with a high quality buckle & durable D-Ring You will receive 1 x Collar & 1 x Engraved Tag The tag comes with a Free split ring to enable you to attach it to the collar. LARRYROO Bright, Colourful Leather Dog / Puppy Collar with Personalised Engraved 25mm Round Glitter Paw Print Tag SIZE GUIDE: X-Small (For neck size 20cm - 26cm): Tea cup, Yorkshire Terrier, Chihuahua, Puppies & Similar size dogs Small (For neck size 27cm - 33cm): Jack Russell, Yorkshire Terrier, Mini Dachshund, Maltese, Pomeranian & Similar size dogs Medium (For neck size 28cm - 36cm): Pug, Boston Terrier, Beagle, Cocker Spaniel & Similar Size Dogs Large (For neck size 36cm - 46cm): Springer Spaniel, Border Collie & Similar Size Dogs X-Large (For neck size 45cm - 55cm): Larger breeds *Please measure your pet's neck for a perfect fit* Tag size is approx 25mm in diameter which is a great size to fit all size dogs! Simply select your required collar size & colour, click 'Customise Now', enter your required engraving for the tag & we will do the rest! Available in 5 Vibrant Matching Colours Available in Black, Blue, Pink, Purple & Red. Neat Stitches Made with neat stitches - Exquisite craftsmanship High Quality Buckle Features Chrome Plated Metal Buckle which is durable and not easy to rust Comes with Personalised Engraved Tag Comes with a Personalised Engraved matching colour round, glitter paw print tag, which can be engraved with your choice of text.
